_comment: Git identity guard configuration. Copy this file to ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/identities.json and customize for your accounts.

_fields.remote_pattern: Substring matched against the git remote origin URL. Use org/user names from your remote URLs (e.g., 'github.com/MyOrg', 'gitlab.com/personal').
_fields.user_name: Expected git user.name for repositories matching this pattern.
_fields.user_email: Expected git user.email for repositories matching this pattern.
